sections.paragraph:
Original: נטע

Transliteration: nâṭa‛

Phonetic: naw-tah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to plant, fasten, fix, establish
    1. (Qal)
      1. to plant
      2. to plant, establish (figuratively)
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to be planted
      2. to be established (figuratively)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1354

Part(s) of speech: Verb
